CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value CLOB);
CREATE TABLE another_table (tag CLOB, test_id INTEGER);
SELECT sys.group_concat(a.value, '; ') FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.test_id WHERE b.tag = 'Tag1';
SELECT sys.group_concat(value, ' | ') FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id > 0) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE yet_another_table (category CLOB, item_id INTEGER);
SELECT y.category, sys.group_concat(x.value, ', ') FROM test_table x JOIN yet_another_table y ON x.id = y.item_id GROUP BY y.category;
CREATE TABLE complex_test_table (grp_id INTEGER, content CLOB);
SELECT grp_id, sys.group_concat(content, '-') FROM complex_test_table GROUP BY grp_id ORDER BY grp_id;
SELECT sys.group_concat(value, ', ') FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table) AS unique_values;
SELECT sys.group_concat(DISTINCT content, '|') AS combined_content FROM complex_test_table WHERE grp_id = 2;
